caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts uniform performs a staff routine in a large, brightly lit indoor hall. He holds a long wooden staff and moves across a blue floor in front of an audience of people seated at long tables draped with red cloths. The room features tall walls, recessed ceiling lighting, and dark wooden doors. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his weight and posture, swinging the staff in a sweeping motion. He moves from a wide, grounded stance to a more dynamic position, rotating the staff overhead and then lunging forward. In the background, the audience members watch the performance from their seats. The lighting remains constant throughout the scene, and no text or logos are visible on the screen.
